name: chr22_q11_23_LCR22C_LCR22G
description: NAHR substrate pair LCR22C-LCR22G on 22q11.23. Mediates recurrent CNV (~2011 kb interval) via direct-orientation SD pair. Architecture per Edelmann 1999 / Demaerel 2019.

architecture.microhomology_bp_at_breakpoint: varies (typically 100-500 bp within shared LCR22 cores)
architecture.internal_structure: LCR22 cores share modules: BCRL2/3/4, GGTLC, USP18/41-like pseudogenes, POM121-like, IGLV pseudogene cassettes; gene content of intervening region varies by pair

sources: Demaerel et al. 2019 AJHG (LCR22 nomenclature update)
McDonald-McGinn et al. 2015 (22q11.2DS Nat Rev Dis Primers)
